text.title: python-pytest-fixtures Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for python-pytest-fixtures as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Returning from a fixture instead of yielding when teardown is needed.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If you return rather than yield, there is no place to put teardown code. Resources leak when tests fail.
